name: @ryu/timeline-app
description: The Ryu Timeline app: the CapCut-style activity replay scrubber over Shadow's captured lanes (screen/input/window/audio/AX/clipboard/git/…), a keyframe preview player, a Dayflow work journal, and jump-to-moment focus — shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Read-only view over Shadow's local /timeline + /journal + /frame through the timeline:read bridge capability; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle).
